flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Purdue University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Purdue University-Main Campus are 51% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($72.4k vs $48.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Purdue University-Main Campus rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (37.7k → 44.5k).
